name: Creamy Crab Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3 green onions, including green parts, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 10-inch glass or ceramic pie dish (or an 11x7-inch glass baking pan) by lightly coating with vegetable cooking spray and setting aside.
3. In a medium bowl, combine crabmeat, Parmesan cheese, chopped green onions, corn, dill weed, white pepper, and salt. Toss well to blend evenly.
4. Spread the mixture evenly across the bottom and two-thirds up the sides of the prepared baking dish.
5. In an empty medium bowl, mix evaporated skim milk, liquid egg substitute, and nonfat sour cream until combined.
6. Pour this mixture evenly over the crab mixture.
7. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until set in the center (if oven temperature is precisely 350°F, 60 minutes is more common).
8. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before slicing.
